/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=auto -fno-fat-lto-objects -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,cgame.so -o Release/cgame.so
